items.nearby_content:
Abstract
On-time graduation is an important performance indicator in higher education,  reflecting  institutional  effectiveness  and  student  success.  However,  existing  academic  monitoring  systems  are  often  limited  to  descriptive  analytics  and  fragmented data, making early identification of at-risk students difficult. This study  proposes  a  machine  learning-integrated  academic  risk  modelling  framework  combined with an interactive Power BI dashboard to monitor and predict student  graduation  outcomes.  A  synthetic  dataset  of  4500  undergraduate  Computer  Science students was generated to simulate realistic academic progression. The  CRISP-DM methodology was adopted, and several supervised learning models  were  evaluated.  A  layered  feature  engineering  approach  was  introduced  to  capture  both  academic  performance  and  progression  dynamics.  After  hyperparameter optimization, the tuned Random Forest model achieved the best  performance with an accuracy of 91.34%, F1-score of 94.26% and AUC-ROC of  0.954. Key predictors include academic risk score, CGPA, attendance and failed  courses. The model outputs were integrated into an interactive das

items.label: Malay Abstract (Abstrak)

items.nearby_content: Kadar  tamat  pengajian  tepat  pada  masanya  merupakan  penunjuk  prestasi  penting dalam pendidikan tinggi kerana mencerminkan keberkesanan institusi  dan kejayaan pelajar. Walau bagaimanapun, sistem pemantauan akademik sedia  ada masih terhad kepada analitik deskriptif dan data yang terpisah, sekali gus  menyukarkan pengenalpastian awal pelajar berisiko. Kajian ini mencadangkan  satu rangka kerja pemodelan risiko akademik berasaskan pembelajaran mesin  yang digabungkan dengan papan pemuka interaktif Power BI untuk memantau  dan  meramal  hasil  tamat  pengajian  pelajar.  Satu  set  data  sintetik  yang  mengandungi 4500 rekod pelajar Sarjana Muda Sains Komputer telah dijana bagi  mensimulasikan  corak  perkembangan  akademik  yang  realistik.  Metodologi  CRISP-DM digunakan dan beberapa model pembelajaran mesin terselia telah  dinilai.  Pendekatan  kejuruteraan  ciri  berlapis  diperkenalkan  bagi  menangkap  kedua-dua  aspek  prestasi  akademik  dan  dinamik  perkembangan  pelajar.  Keputusan  menunjukkan  bahawa  model  Random  Forest  mencapai  prestasi  terbaik dengan ketepatan 91.34%, skor F1 sebanyak 94.26% dan AUC-ROC  sebanyak 0.954. Faktor utama yang mempengaruhi ram
